name: Micro-X Limited
summary: Micro-X Limited designs, develops, and manufactures ultra-lightweight carbon nano tube based X-ray products for the healthcare and improvised explosive device imaging security markets in Australia. The company offers Carestream DRX Revolution Nano, an ultra-lightweight digital mobile X-ray system for bedside imaging for use in hospital wards and intensive care units; and Rover, a digital mobile X-Ray unit for deployed military hospitals. It is also developing Mobile Backscatter Imager for stand-off imaging of improvised explosive devices. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Tonsley, Australia.
